title: A Minecraft Movie Mobs
description: Changes the appearance of some mobs to look like they're form the movie
body:
(REQUIRES OPTIFINE)
 I think we can all agree that the mobs in A Minecraft Movie look a bit... weird compared to the ones in the game. But what if Minecraft’s mobs actually looked like the ones from the movie?
 
 Well — this resource pack turns every mob from the movie into its movie version. The Bee, the Wolf, the Zombie, the CHICKEN JOCKEY — they’re all here! 
 
 Some mobs in the game have variants we didn’t get to see in the movie, so I did my best to replicate them in the same movie style. This pack is still a bit experimental, and I’ll probably tweak some mob textures and models in the future, as well as add new content like tools or new mobs if they show up in upcoming movies.
 
 I had a lot of fun making these models and I hope you all enjoy my hard work! :)
 
 Btw if you use this pack for a video please give me credit, I put a lot of work into this lol
